Focus heavily on exploitable injection and remote code execution paths in changed files.
For this repository, treat the following as HIGH or CRITICAL severity:
- Command injection from untrusted input
- SQL injection from untrusted input
- Insecure deserialization of untrusted input
- Dynamic code execution of untrusted input (eval/exec/new Function)
- Hardcoded production secrets or tokens
- Insecure IaC defaults that expose resources publicly
- GitHub Actions workflows that execute user-controllable shell commands

When any of these appear in changed code, report findings with explicit severity, file path, and line number.
